zh.lifeSummary: 當William Stourton 2nd Baron Stourton於大約1432年出生在英國時，他的父親Sir John Stourton, KT. Knight, Ist Baron Stourton34歲，母親Margery Wadham51歲。他於1450年5月18日之前與Margaret Chidiocke在英國結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和9個女兒的父母。他於1451年在英國多瑟特被列為justice of the peace。他去世於1478年2月18日在英國維爾爾享年47歲，埋葬在英國維爾爾梅。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Stourton 2nd Baron Stourton于大约1432年出生在英国时，他的父亲Sir John Stourton, KT. Knight, Ist Baron Stourton34岁，母亲Margery Wadham51岁。他于1450年5月18日之前与Margaret Chidiocke在英国结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和9个女儿的父母。他于1451年在英国多瑟特被列为justice of the peace。他去世于1478年2月18日在英国維爾爾享年47岁，埋葬在英国維爾爾梅。

nameMeanings.name: Stourton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  English: locative name from any of three places named Stourton (Staffs, Wilts, Warwicks).
3 English: locative name, perhaps occasionally from Storrington (Sussex), which is recorded as Storgetune in 1086.

variants.name: Sturton
meanings: 1  English: locative name from Sturton le Steeple (Notts), Great Sturton (Lincs), Sturton by Stow (Lincs), or possibly Sturton (Northumb), all of which place-names share the same etymology and early spellings as   Stratton  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When William Stourton 2nd Baron Stourton was born about 1432, in England, his father, Sir John Stourton, KT. Knight, Ist Baron Stourton, was 34 and his mother, Margery Wadham, was 51. He married Margaret Chidiocke before 18 May 1450, in England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 9 daughters. In 1451, at the age of 20, his occupation is listed as justice of the peace in Dorset, England. He died on 18 February 1478, in Wiltshire, England, at the age of 47, and was buried in Mere, Wiltshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Stourton 2nd Baron Stourton est né environ 1432, à Angleterre, son père, Sir John Stourton, KT. Knight, Ist Baron Stourton, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Margery Wadham, avait 51 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Chidiocke avant 18 mai 1450, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 9 filles. En 1451, à l’âge de 20 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est justice of the peace à Dorset, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 18 février 1478, à Wiltshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Mere, Wiltshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Stourton 2nd Baron Stourton um 1432 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Stourton, KT. Knight, Ist Baron Stourton 34 und seine Mutter Margery Wadham 51. Er hat vor 18. Mai 1450 in England Margaret Chidiocke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 9 Töchter. 1451, als er 20 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als justice of the peace in Dorset, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 18. Februar 1478 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Wiltshire, England und wurde in Mere, Wiltshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Stourton 2nd Baron Stourton è nato il circa 1432 nel England, il suo padre, Sir John Stourton, KT. Knight, Ist Baron Stourton, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Margery Wadham, aveva 51 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Chidiocke prima del 18 maggio 1450, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 9 figlie. Nel 1451, all'età di 20 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come justice of the peace nel Dorset, England. Morì il 18 febbraio 1478, nel Wiltshire, England, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolto a Mere, Wiltshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Stourton 2nd Baron Stourtonが約1432年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Sir John Stourton, KT. Knight, Ist Baron Stourtonは34歳，母Margery Wadhamは51歳であった。1450年5月18日以前にイギリスでMargaret Chidiockeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。1451年，20歳の時，イギリスドールセトでの職業はjustice of the peaceと記録されている。彼は1478年2月18日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアで47歳で死去し，イギリスウィルトシュアイアメアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Stourton 2nd Baron Stourton(이)가 대략 1432년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Stourton, KT. Knight, Ist Baron Stourton(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Wadham(은)는 51세였다. 그는 1450년 5월 18일 이전 영국에서 Margaret Chidiocke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 1451년, 20세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 도르세트에서 justice of the peace이었다. 그는 1478년 2월 18일 영국 윌츠히르에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 윌츠히르 머에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Stourton 2nd Baron Stourton nasceu aproximadamente 1432, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Stourton, KT. Knight, Ist Baron Stourton, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Margery Wadham, tinha 51 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Chidiocke antes 18 de maio de 1450, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 9 filhas. Em 1451, com 20 anos, sua profissão aparece como justice of the peace em Dorset, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 18 de fevereiro de 1478, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Mere, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Stourton 2nd Baron Stourton родился около 1432 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Stourton, KT. Knight, Ist Baron Stourton было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Margery Wadham, 51. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Chidiocke перед 18 май 1450 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 9 дочерей. В 1451 году, в возрасте 20 лет,  он работал по профессии justice of the peace в местности дорсет, Англия. Он умер 18 февраля 1478 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности мир, уилцхир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Stourton 2nd Baron Stourton nació aproximadamente 1432, en Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Stourton, KT. Knight, Ist Baron Stourton, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Margery Wadham, tenía 51 años. Se casó con Margaret Chidiocke antes de 18 de mayo de 1450, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 9 hijas. En 1451, a la edad de 20 años, su ocupación registrada era justice of the peace en Dorset, Inglaterra. Murió el 18 de febrero de 1478, en Wiltshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultado en Mere, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.
